languages.text: "Для Его Сиятельства я этого аф Иррамона зубами порву!"

traits.locale_text: "Для Его Сиятельства я этого аф Иррамона зубами порву!"

languages.text: "For His Lordship, I'll rip that af Irramon apart with my bare teeth!"

languages.text: "Für Seine Lordschaft reiße ich diesen af Irramon mit bloßen Zähnen in Stücke!"
languages.original_text: "For His Lordship, I'll rip that af Irramon apart with my bare teeth!"

traits.locale_text: "Für Seine Lordschaft reiße ich diesen af Irramon mit bloßen Zähnen in Stücke!"

languages.text: “为了大人，我就算用牙也要把那个阿夫·伊拉蒙撕成碎片！”
languages.original_text: "For His Lordship, I'll rip that af Irramon apart with my bare teeth!"

traits.locale_text: “为了大人，我就算用牙也要把那个阿夫·伊拉蒙撕成碎片！”

languages.text: « Pour Sa Seigneurie, je réduirai cet af Irramon en charpie ! »
languages.original_text: "For His Lordship, I'll rip that af Irramon apart with my bare teeth!"

traits.locale_text: « Pour Sa Seigneurie, je réduirai cet af Irramon en charpie ! »

languages.text: «¡Por Su Señoría, haré pedazos a ese af Irramon a dentelladas si fuese preciso!».
languages.original_text: "For His Lordship, I'll rip that af Irramon apart with my bare teeth!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Por Su Señoría, haré pedazos a ese af Irramon a dentelladas si fuese preciso!».

languages.text: "Lord Hazretleri için o af İrramon'u çıplak dişlerimle parçalayacağım!"
languages.original_text: "For His Lordship, I'll rip that af Irramon apart with my bare teeth!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Hazretleri için o af İrramon'u çıplak dişlerimle parçalayacağım!"

languages.text: 「お館様のために、このイラモンを裸の歯で引き裂きます！」
languages.original_text: "For His Lordship, I'll rip that af Irramon apart with my bare teeth!"

traits.locale_text: 「お館様のために、このイラモンを裸の歯で引き裂きます！」
